chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Revision Application No.209 of 2023 (Muhammad Akram vs. Muhammad Waqas Fareed & another) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.12916/2023 2. For hg. of case 3. For orders on MA No.14034/2024 15.01.2025 Ms. Pir Darwesh Khan Kheshgi, advocate for applicant Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl: PG Sindh O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant (Muhammad Akram) is complainant in FIR No.269/2022, u/s 320 PPC at Police Station Jackson, Karachi and is aggrieved by the impugned order dated 27.05.2023 whereby vehicle viz. Truck Trailer bearing Registration No.TLT-695 Maker Daweo has been released to Muhammad Waqas against a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.2,000,000/- with direction to him to produce the said vehicle as and when required in the trial. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that Muhammad Waqas is not owner of the vehicle and he is not producing the same in the trial Court. 3. This application has been opposed by learned Addl: PG Sindh, who submits that applicant should file an application before the trial Court first for seeking direction to Muhammad Waqas to produce the said vehicle in the trial. 4. I agree with the learned Addl: PG Sindh and dismiss this criminal miscellaneous application, putting applicant however at liberty to move a proper application before the trial Court for seeking the same relief. This criminal miscellaneous application stands disposed of along with listed application in above terms. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
